title: lycopodium cernuum var. lehmannii
intro: Lycopodium cernuum var. lehmannii is a variety of the Lycopodium cernuum plant, a type of club moss that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium cernuum var. lehmannii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions and wounds due to its antiseptic properties. Lycopodium cernuum var. lehmannii can be prepared as an herbal tincture, tea, or topical cream, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
